question: How do I create a Contoso account?
answer: Visit contoso.com/register and fill in the form with your email address and a secure password. After registering, you will receive a confirmation email — click the link to activate your account.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: On the login page, click 'Forgot password', enter your email address, and follow the instructions in the email we send you. The reset link is valid for 24 hours.

question: What subscription plans does Contoso offer?
answer: Contoso offers three plans: Starter (free, up to 5 users), Business ($29/month, up to 25 users, includes priority support), and Enterprise (custom pricing, unlimited users, SLA guarantee, and a dedicated account manager).

question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan at any time?
answer: Yes, plan changes are possible at any time. An upgrade takes effect immediately and is billed on a pro-rata basis. A downgrade becomes active at the end of the current billing period.

question: What payment methods does Contoso accept?
answer: We accept credit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, and SEPA direct debit. Annual billing includes 2 months free.

question: How do I get an invoice?
answer: Invoices are sent automatically by email after each payment and are also available under Settings → Billing → Invoice history. Invoices can be downloaded as PDF.

question: How do I add new team members?
answer: Go to Settings → Team → Invite member, enter the email address, and select a role (Admin, Editor, or Viewer). The invited person will receive an email with an activation link.

question: How do I remove a team member?
answer: Under Settings → Team, click the three dots next to any member and select 'Remove member'. Access is revoked immediately. The member's content remains in the workspace.

question: How do I contact Contoso support?
answer: Our support team is available by email (support@contoso.com), live chat on contoso.com (Mon–Fri 8am–6pm), and by phone for Business and Enterprise customers at +1 800 266 8676. Typical email response time: under 4 hours.

question: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
answer: Yes, the Business plan can be trialed free for 14 days — no credit card required. After the trial, your account is automatically downgraded to the free Starter plan with no data loss.

question: How do I export my data from Contoso?
answer: Under Settings → Data → Export, you can download all your data as a ZIP archive (JSON + CSV). The export is delivered by email within 30 minutes. Exports are unlimited and available at any time.

question: How secure is my data at Contoso?
answer: All data is stored with AES-256 encryption and transmitted over TLS 1.3. Contoso is ISO 27001 certified and GDPR compliant. Data centres are located exclusively in the EU (Frankfurt and Amsterdam).
